title: nephrodium prolixum var. tylodes
intro: Nephrodium prolixum var. tylodes, also known as the Fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, specifically a variety of the Nephrodium prolixum plant. The medicinal properties of Nephrodium prolixum var. tylodes include its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of using Nephrodium prolixum var. tylodes include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, Nephrodium prolixum var. tylodes has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
